strengths: Demonstrated proper instrument handling and basic transfer mechanics
Maintained steady camera positioning throughout the attempt
Showed persistence and continued working methodically despite time pressure
weaknesses: Exceeded the 300-second time limit resulting in automatic task failure
Appeared to struggle with efficient object manipulation and transfer sequences
Lost significant time during setup and initial pickup phases

drills.name: Speed ladder transfers
drills.description: Practice 10 complete peg-to-peg transfers focusing on minimizing hesitation between pickup and release phases.
drills.targets_weakness: Exceeded the 300-second time limit resulting in automatic task failure

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, focusing on direct paths and efficient instrument positioning.
drills.targets_weakness: Lost significant time during setup and initial pickup phases

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, emphasizing smooth hand-to-hand exchanges.
drills.targets_weakness: Appeared to struggle with efficient object manipulation and transfer sequences

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid fundamentals into faster execution. The 300-second time limit requires efficient movement patterns and minimal hesitation between phases.
